spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (based, integrity, signature) and 6 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface: 4 form controls wired to ~2586 chars of script that mutate the page state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 7 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is covered; the page does not visibly handle missing-API, empty-input, or error branches — those edges are the spec's harder territory.

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5032324620877824 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

openQuestions.title: Add an explicit edge-case branch
openQuestions.detail: The page covers the happy path. Pick at least one failure mode from the spec (missing permission, empty input, unsupported value, rate-limit, etc.) and wire a button that drives the API into that branch with the resulting error / fallback shown in the page.

summary: Solid concept page: 5 of 6 rubric criteria pass, no fails. Minor follow-ups left as open questions.
